feat: Simplify for ECE 110 project - Add dark theme dashboard

Major Changes:
- Removed all Chinese/Japanese translations and complex features
- Deleted advanced components (prediction markets, arbitrage, chatbot)
- Translated core analysis files to English
- Added sleek dark grey web dashboard with bullish/bearish indicators
- Created simple post fetcher (fetch_new_posts.py)
- Added sentiment analysis and historical stats to dashboard
- Simplified to core functionality for educational demo

New Features:
- Dark theme dashboard with real-time updates
- Bullish/bearish/neutral sentiment badges on each tweet
- Visual sentiment distribution charts
- Country mention tracking (Iran, China, Russia, etc.)
- Signal classification (TARIFF=bearish, DEAL=bullish)
- Historical accuracy stats
- Auto-refresh every 60 seconds

Files Added:
- dashboard.html - Professional dark theme interface
- server.py - Simple Python web server with API
- fetch_new_posts.py - Fetch latest Trump posts from Truth Social

Educational Focus:
- ECE 110 appropriate complexity
- Demonstrates API integration, data analysis, pattern recognition
- All in English, clean code structure
- Perfect for class presentation

EOF
